name: Logto
tagline: A comprehensive identity solution covering both the front and backend, complete with pre-built infrastructure and enterprise-grade solutions.
description:
A comprehensive identity solution covering both the front and backend, complete with pre-built infrastructure and enterprise-grade solutions.

Docs: https://docs.logto.io/docs/tutorials/get-started/#logto-oss-self-hosted?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  logto:
    image: svhd/logto:${TAG-latest}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    entrypoint:
      - sh
      - -c
      - npm run cli db seed -- --swe && npm run alteration deploy latest && npm start
    environment:
      - TRUST_PROXY_HEADER=1
      - DB_URL=postgres://uca6448bb5d:d8b920ec0e16266a710fffc5d138561d@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-logto}
      - ENDPOINT=$LOGTO_ENDPOINT
      - ADMIN_ENDPOINT=$LOGTO_ADMIN_ENDPOINT
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - exit 0
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42060:80
  postgres:
    image: postgres:14-alpine
    user: postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: uca6448bb5d
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: d8b920ec0e16266a710fffc5d138561d
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-logto}
    volumes:
      - logto-postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - pg_isready
        - -U
        - uca6448bb5d
        - -d
        - $POSTGRES_DB
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  logto-postgres-data: null
